response: The collateral-free limit for agricultural credit is up to ₹ 5 million against pledge/hypothecation of agricultural produce (including warehouse receipts) for a period not exceeding 12 months, as per the Kisan Credit Card Scheme [N3].
source_text: Loans to farmers up to ₹ 5 million against pledge/ hypothecation of agricultural produce (including warehouse receipts) for a period not exceeding 12 months. [N3]
circular_title: Master Circular - Kisan Credit Card (KCC) Scheme
